description: baseline audit — top 5: broken skill filters, raw skill IDs, window.confirm delete, raw tool slugs in approvals, double streaming indicator
humanize skill IDs, remove broken filter tabs, inline delete confirm
humanize tool names in approvals, remove raw task IDs, fallback slug humanizer
remove internal jargon from toasts and connectors page sign-in gate
remove non-functional mic button, dead imports, proper send disable state
show real activity in thinking shimmer instead of hardcoded "Thinking", humanize tool labels
activate Fast/Smart/Cheap capability badges (pre-existing dead code)
remove orchestrator/subagents jargon from routing panel, hide raw agent IDs
smooth streaming fade-in, skill create uses human name with auto slug preview
sample prompts upgraded from plain text to pill chip buttons with arrow icon
remove "orchestrator", "Clerk-backed", "runtime endpoint" jargon from settings modal
add execution context note to approval gate — "Runs on AI server, not local machine"
wire ApprovalGate into feed — approval buttons were never rendered, users couldn't approve/reject commands
remove dead "Learn more" button, humanize skills 404 error, send button disabled until model loads
replace "workflow/orchestration/model discovery" jargon with plain language across task UI and onboarding
replace "workflow" with "task" in context menus, tooltips, command palette, keyboard shortcuts, files page
remove "surface/team context APIs/placeholder" dev jargon from connectors tabs
task input send button proper disabled state; "workflow" copy cleanup in CommandInput and TaskList
Workflow Failed error alert → "Task Failed"
humanize overlap policy display, capitalize status, "workflows" → "tasks" in empty state
remove dead TaskStartInput component
remove dead TemplatesGallery component (129 lines of dead code)
Agent Health → "Model Health" in settings panel
minor copy polish in Memory tab and connector descriptions
inline delete confirmation for schedules/memories; fix "Sub Agent" → "AI" fallback label
OAuth toast clarity: "validate" → "Test connection"; guide user through refresh step after sign-in
humanize tool slug tags in skill detail; skill editor jargon cleanup
remove orchestrator/subagents jargon from routing panel, hide raw agent IDs
humanize agent type tags in TaskGroupBlock and last-run status in SchedulesTab
sidebar shows "Untitled task" instead of raw UUID when task has no objective
replace "workflow" with "task" in toasts, connectors copy, teams tab, and App.tsx
workflow → task in TaskItem delete toasts and TaskList search aria-label
add delete confirmation modal to TaskItem — replace immediate-fire delete
add Failed/Paused status pill badge in TaskDetail header next to task title
add loading states to SchedulesTab/MemoryTab/TemplatesTab — prevent double-submit and show feedback
copy polish: "tool calls" → "actions", "Start Agent Task" → "Start Parallel Task", "override" → "custom"
align agent label style — noun form (Analysis/Writing/Coding) across AgentHealthPanel
send button shows spinner during task creation; fix last "Agent health" heading
remove "Clerk" from auth gate button and description
humanize "chunks"/"extraction_mode" in FilesPage; remove "endpoint"/"Clerk" from SettingsModal
connector panel jargon cleanup: metadata/credentials/provider-defined
rewrite SettingsConnectorsPanel hero — remove dev jargon, add clear user-facing copy
remove raw Notion workspace_id from connector summary display
Start Your First Workflow → "Start Your First Task" in onboarding modal
add confirmation modal for knowledge document deletion in FilesPage
Capabilities discovered → "Available models" in SettingsModal
remove jargon from SettingsModal nav descriptions (control plane, runtime routing, curation)
SettingsIconsPanel hero copy — remove "curate", "inferred branding", "base URL"
Relay Control Room badge → "Settings" in SettingsModal header
ApprovalGate: disable both buttons + spinner while approve/reject in flight
TaskDetail: disable Retry/Pause/Cancel buttons + spinner during action
Improve empty states, error messages, remove 'endpoint' jargon
CommandPalette 'Recent Workflows', SkillsPage 'ID:', CommandInput 'Attachments'
ConnectorsTab toast copy, SchedulesTab refresh spinner
TemplatesTab 'Objective' -> 'Goal', refresh spinner; SkillsPage import toast humanized
Remove 'agent'/'workflow' from TaskContextMenu, TaskList, FullPageChat, ChatModal
SettingsModal: 'workflows' -> 'tasks' in server description
SkillsPage: 'what your computer can do' -> 'what your AI can do'
FilesPage: 'Session active/inactive' → 'Workspace ready/No active workspace'; toast copy
SchedulesTab 'Objective required' → 'Task goal required'; billing toast copy
SchedulesTab: 'Objective' form label → 'Goal'

SkillsPage and MemoryTab: more specific validation toast messages
